scripts.purpose: Non-runnable contract placeholder for the missing L2 24 h Canary forecast shell entry point.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: M19 would lack the promised stable shell interface for L2 24 h Canary recovery runs.

scripts.purpose: Non-runnable contract placeholder for the missing L3 24 h Canary forecast shell entry point.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: M19 would lack the promised stable shell interface for L3 24 h Canary recovery runs.

scripts.purpose: Current L2 d02 replay-validation orchestrator; closest existing runnable path for L2 Canary 24 h proofs.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: M19 L2 single-case recovery and later L2 validation would have no current orchestration script.

scripts.purpose: Current L3 daily Canary pipeline CLI around execute_daily_pipeline and run_forecast_operational.
produces_outputs: hourly forecast output files under output-dir
required_inputs: AEMET observation root when --score is used
scripts.blocker_if_missing: Current L3 24 h operational pipeline smoke and station scoring would be unreachable.

scripts.purpose: Legacy M6 coupled d02 forecast runner that writes compact WRF-shaped outputs and transfer/spacetime proof objects.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: Legacy M6 forecast proof reproduction would be blocked, but M7 daily pipeline remains the preferred operational path.

scripts.purpose: Original M6B one-hour L3 Canary operational-mode acceptance probe.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: Historical M6B acceptance evidence would be harder to reproduce; later V3 script supersedes it.

scripts.purpose: Retry M6B one-hour L3 Canary operational-mode acceptance probe.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: Historical M6B retry evidence would be harder to reproduce; V3 script supersedes it.

scripts.purpose: Latest M6B one-hour L3 Canary operational-mode acceptance probe used by later diagnostics.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: M6B V3 acceptance, localization, and M7 audit references would lose their current anchor.

scripts.purpose: Runs all-three-variable Tier-4 acceptance checks on L3 Canary operational forecasts.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: Historical M6 Tier-4 acceptance checks would be unavailable.

scripts.purpose: Dry-run Tier-4 RMSE path for a selected L3 Canary replay case.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: Dry-run RMSE reproduction would be blocked; not the primary M19 shell entry.

scripts.purpose: M6 performance acceptance runner for one-hour Canary-shaped operational forecasts.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: M6 performance acceptance reproduction would be blocked; M22 will recertify performance.

scripts.purpose: Synthetic/Canary-shaped one-hour performance design probe for run_forecast_operational.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: Performance-design reproduction would be blocked; not a skill-proof entry.

scripts.purpose: M7 one-hour L3 Canary GPU wall-clock and profiler orchestrator.
required_inputs: profiler tooling when profiling is enabled
scripts.blocker_if_missing: M7 GPU wall-clock/profiling reproduction would be blocked; M22 performs final recertification.

scripts.purpose: M7 restart-continuity probe for L3 Canary operational carry/state serialization.
produces_outputs: single-run and split-run forecast timing summaries
scripts.blocker_if_missing: Restart-continuity evidence would be unavailable.

scripts.purpose: M7 root-cause analysis runner that brackets L3 Canary forecasts with physics on/off.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: M7 physics-bracket RCA reproduction would be blocked.

scripts.purpose: M7 nested-grid memory audit using L2 target metadata with an L3 fallback operational forecast probe.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: 1 km memory-audit reproduction would be unavailable; not a primary forecast entry.

scripts.purpose: Publication high-priority orchestrator that can run available Canary daily pipeline subsets and write proof objects.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: Publication high-priority Canary proof reproduction would be blocked.

scripts.purpose: Aggregates Canary publication skill evidence by delegating to the high-priority Canary writer.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: Publication skill aggregation convenience entry would be unavailable.

scripts.purpose: Writes Canary first-error-growth publication evidence by delegating to the high-priority Canary writer.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: Publication first-error-growth convenience entry would be unavailable.

scripts.purpose: Selects Canary CPU/GPU case windows for publication proof runs; does not run forecasts itself.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: M20 validation-corpus selection would lack this existing helper.

scripts.purpose: Governance validator discovered by the contract find command; not a Canary forecast runner.
required_inputs: ADR paths or default repository ADR set

scripts.purpose: AgentOS validator discovered by the contract find command; not a Canary forecast runner.
Fixture-manifest validator discovered by the contract find command; used by WRF/analytic oracle manifests.
scripts.blocker_if_missing: Future savepoint/fixture manifests would lose the existing CLI validator.

scripts.purpose: Memory patch validator discovered by the contract find command; not a Canary forecast runner.
Project skill validator discovered by the contract find command; not a Canary forecast runner.
